Event: Experimental Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 05/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: D35
Fiery Inventor Daggers

When attacking, has a 17% chance of dealing 150% damage in 5 seconds.
For the entire duration of the battle, the unit's attacks restore health equal to 80% of the damage dealt, while also reducing the physical and magic armor of the target and 2 enemy units closest to it by 20% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. The unit's attacks also remove 4 random positive effects from the target and 2 enemy units closest to it and deal 500000 pure damage to the targets. The daggers' wielder restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
